summary: Real Estate Valuation Engine module fully tested. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). All 5 frontend tabs verified: Dashboard, Direct Cap, DCF, Cost, and Sales Comparison. All valuation calculations working correctly with proper results display.
critical_code_review_comments: All three valuation approaches (Income, Cost, Sales Comparison) are fully implemented
Direct Cap calculator correctly shows income statement breakdown (PGI, EGI, NOI) and formula
DCF analysis displays NPV, IRR, Equity Multiple, and cash flow projections
Cost Approach shows RCN, depreciation breakdown (physical, functional, external), and formula
Sales Comparison allows adding multiple comparables with adjustment calculations
Dashboard KPIs correctly aggregate portfolio data
data-testid attributes properly added to all tabs and calculate buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real Estate Valuation Engine fully implemented and tested. All APIs use SAMPLE/HARDCODED data (not from real DB) - this is intentional per the design. The module has 5 tabs: Dashboard, Direct Cap, DCF, Cost, Sales Comp. All calculations are working correctly. Frontend URL: /valuation accessible from sidebar 'RE Valuation' menu item.
passed_tests: Dashboard tab: Shows KPI cards (Portfolio Value $990.0M, Avg Cap Rate 4.67%, Avg Value/SF $567, Total Valuations 8)
Dashboard tab: Shows Properties by Type chart (Office 1, Retail 1, Industrial 1, Multifamily 1)
Dashboard tab: Shows Valuations by Method chart (Direct Cap 4, DCF 2, Cost 4, Sales Comp 3)
Dashboard tab: Shows Property Portfolio table with 4 properties
Direct Cap tab: All input fields present (Rentable Area, Market Rent, Other Income, Vacancy Rate, etc.)
Direct Cap tab: Calculate button works - shows Property Value $33,015,000 ($330/SF)
Direct Cap tab: Income Statement breakdown displays correctly (PGI, EGI, NOI)
Direct Cap tab: Key metrics display (Expense Ratio 35%, GIM 9.30x, NIM 15.38x)
DCF tab: All input fields present (Projection Years, NOI, Growth Rates, Discount Rate, etc.)
DCF tab: Run DCF Analysis works - shows NPV $31,367,341, IRR 21.45%, Equity Multiple 5.18x
DCF tab: Cash flow table displays 10-year projections
DCF tab: Sensitivity analysis for cap rate and discount rate displays
Cost tab: All input fields present (Land Area, Building Area, Construction Type, Quality, etc.)
Cost tab: Calculate works - shows Property Value $39,870,000 ($399/SF)
Cost tab: Value Breakdown displays (Land Value, RCN, Depreciation breakdown)
Sales Comp tab: Subject Property inputs present (Size, Year Built, Quality, Condition, Location)
Sales Comp tab: 2 sample comparables pre-filled with all fields
Sales Comp tab: Add Comparable button visible
Sales Comp tab: Calculate Value button works

mocked_apis_list: Note: Sample data is intentional per design - valuation calculations are real

cost_calculator.sample_calculation: 2.5 acres + 100,000 SF steel frame Class A = $39,870,000
